case_title: GUTIERREZ JERRY VS NIJEM ZAKI DBA SUPERETTE MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,820.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT NIJEM ZAKI DBA SUPERETTE MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NIJEM ZAKI DBA SUPERETTE MARKET
POS ON SUPBOENA DUCES TECUM TO TOM HART FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ JERRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NIJEM ZAKI DBA SUPERETTE MARKET ORDERED FOR PLFT ONLY AS TO THE RETURN OF TOOLS.NO AWARD FOR CLAIM FOR REIMBURSEMENT. TOOLS TO BE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
